content.en:
The two words Ye Tian announced the end of the supreme force of Xuandong Mountain.

The supreme forces, that are the existence that the top forces cannot imagine, they are transcendent and supreme, they have already broken away from places like the Eternal Realm and the Realm of God Realm, and stepped into the Void of Death.

They dominate the fate of a large number of top forces and powerful forces, and they are unimaginably strong, and sending a strong man at will is enough to sweep everything.

But at this time, such a powerful supreme force is like an ant, unable to control its own life.

Rumble!!!!!

The gods of the Liangyi Realm took action one after another, and no matter how the gods of the Six Caves resisted, they were all killed one by one.

Not only were these pinnacle realm gods killed, but those high-level leaders were also killed, and only the irrelevant bottoms survived and were divided up by the supreme forces one by one, and these bottoms chose to join these supreme forces.

If "Five-Eighty-Three" does not join, it will also be wiped out.

Moreover, these peak realm gods can easily deduce whether these bottom layers are resentful, and once they are resentful, they will also be wiped out.

Soon after, Xuandong Mountain was completely removed.

......

"There are really a lot of good things on these Ice Ghost Organization Peak Realm Gods!"

Ye Tian said happily.

As the biggest contributor to the fight against the Ice Ghost Organization this time, he naturally gained the most benefits, and even gained more than his own losses.

Not to mention the super-dimensional secret treasure obtained from the Ice Ghost Organization, as well as some super-dimensional resources, it is estimated that the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization did not expect that they would fall here.

Therefore, they all carry a lot of extradimensional resources on their bodies.

Plus, they even have some heritage on them.

For Ye Tian, these inheritances are the most precious.

"There are a lot of inheritances that can be purchased on the ship, but the price is so expensive that even if I am rich, I am reluctant to buy them. "

And now, he has gained a lot of inheritance.

For example, he obtained three extra-dimensional Dao inheritances, but unfortunately they were only ordinary extra-dimensional Dao inheritances.

In addition to these extradimensional pathway lineages, there is also a lot of information about cultivation and so on.

In addition, there is information about a number of territories.

From this information, he finally knew why the Ice Ghost Organization was able to cross the boundary extradimensional barrier and enter their territory of 7362.

"Domain-Breaking Star Array!"

This is a very rare extra-dimensional formation, but if it is urged, it will cost a lot, but it can arrange a small Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array in other territories.

In this way, urging the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array can pay one-tenth of the price.

At this time, Ye Tian finally knew what the formation arranged by Xuandong Mountain was.

And if the Domain-Breaking Star Array is urged once, if you want to urge it a second time, you can't do it in a short period of time, at least one extradimensional era apart, or pay a greater price.

Obviously, the Ice Ghost Organization was absolutely unwilling to pay that price.

Then, in other words, the Ice Ghost Organization will definitely not be able to invade this place within an extradimensional era.

And after an extradimensional era, the extradimensional storm has already begun.

At that time, the Ice Ghost Organization could not enter unless they were willing to die.

And the extradimensional storm will last for a long time, at least one or two extradimensional epochs, and in some special cases, it is not impossible to last for ten extradimensional epochs.

The point is that even if the extradimensional storm dissipates after two extradimensional epochs, the extradimensional void at that time was still unstable.

The Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array also penetrates the boundary extra-dimensional barrier through the extra-dimensional void, and if the extra-dimensional void is unstable, the ice ghost organization will not dare to enter.

So.

At the very least, within a dozen extradimensional eras, the Ice Ghost Organization would never dare to invade here.

"More than a dozen extradimensional eras, at that time, my strength may be enough to be proud of the Ice Ghost Organization!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had this self-confidence entirely because he knew the strength of the Ice Ghost Organization, and he didn't even have a half-step extradimensional realm, and the strongest person was estimated to be slightly more powerful than the Blood Shadow Puppet.

So, he didn't need to worry about the Ice Ghost Organization at all.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also got a message from these extra-dimensional information.

That's the extradimensional storm, it's not exactly a crisis, but also a hint of chance.

Extradimensional elves are extremely rare, they control the real extradimensional power, and the strength of each one is at least comparable to a half-step extradimensional realm, and the best of them may even be comparable to the real extradimensional realm0 .....

Any extradimensional elf is incomparably precious, they contain special extradimensional patterns, comprehending extradimensional patterns, or studying their extradimensional powers, will help to comprehend the true extradimensional power.

So.

When the extradimensional storm blows, there may be an extradimensional realm to capture the extradimensional elves.

Of course. []

The existence of the extradimensional realm will not capture the extradimensional elves in the territory of 7362, but follow the superdimensional storm and go to the source direction to capture the extradimensional elves.

That area was a place that Ye Tian was not qualified to enter.

However, there is also a slight possibility that the extradimensional elves will enter the territory of 7362, depending on luck.

"If I am lucky enough to encounter an extradimensional elf, although I am not an opponent, if I fight with it, even if I am killed by it, I will be able to get a glimpse of the mystery of the real extradimensional power, which is very helpful for me to comprehend the superdimensional power. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

His comprehension is not bad, and he also has to copy his body for trial and error, why he has not been able to comprehend the real extradimensional power, that is, he has not seen the real extradimensional power, and he has no direction to comprehend at all.

Therefore, this extradimensional storm may also be his chance.

......

The other side.

The pinnacle realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization were extremely angry, especially the Ziya Realm Gods who were in charge of this plan, and they were eager to immediately enter the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two Territory.

But now they can't do this, forcibly opening the Domain-Breaking Realm Star Array, the price of 5.6, even if the Ice Ghost Organization can afford it, it is far from worth it.

"Then wait for a dozen extradimensional eras!"

The God of the Tooth Realm said coldly.

It's only a dozen extradimensional eras, and for a peak realm god, it can't improve his strength at all.

"By the way, keep an eye on the No. 6 Garanbao ship, if there is a peak realm god from the 7,362nd realm who dismounts from above, he will kill it by all means. "

The God of the Tooth Realm commanded.

Of course, it is not easy to keep an eye on the No. 6 Garanbao, and no one knows the route of the No. 6 Garanbao, so they can only say that they should do it as much as possible.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

At this time, there was not much time left before the Garanbo ship descended on the territory of 7,362 again.
